reviews.title: Excellent customer service from Simon…
reviews.body: Excellent customer service from Simon Thompson, he was so friendly and made the whole process so much easier for us.

reviews.title: Louise Blond 23
reviews.body: Louise was very pleasant , patient and informative .Peterborough branch .

reviews.title: Have dealt with the Epsom branch a lot…
reviews.body: Have dealt with the Epsom branch a lot over the last few months with regards to an LPA I have over my aunt. Everyone has been very helpful especially Richard

reviews.title: Racheal Ogunsakin at Leeds Building…
reviews.body: Racheal Ogunsakin at Leeds Building Society answered all my remortgage queries most efficiently. Rachel explained the options available fo me and patiently clarified details. I was reassured on the next steps I need to take, by the end of the call. Thank you Racheal!

reviews.title: Visited the Morley branch and met a…
reviews.body: Visited the Morley branch and met a lovely, well informed lady called Michelle.We opened our account without any fuss and got what we needed. Excellent, polite, and easy to deal with.

reviews.title: Ring the help line - if in doubt!
reviews.body: I have a number of accounts with Leeds Building Society and have been with them for a long time. As an older customer I find doing things on line more difficult.  Two accounts were maturing so having got confused navigating on line I rang the help desk and spoke to Ahtikha - she very kindly quided me through the process - Twice! - So for those of us technically challenged - give them a ring and they will help

reviews.title: Great in-branch service
reviews.body: Dealt with Tracey in Manchester branch.  Great to get immediate, authoritative and competent service in-branch without a long wait for an appointment.  Many thanks.

reviews.title: Very good service from the telephone service team
reviews.body: Very good service from the team dealing with online queries, they helped me work though a number of technical solutions and were patient and understanding.  The call was picked up instantly on every occasion, no waiting in a telephone queue for an agent.

reviews.title: Scott at Manchester was exceptional…
reviews.body: Scott at Manchester was exceptional today. He was extremely helpful and pleasant to deal with. My wife and myself cannot praise him too highly. We have always received brilliant service from the Manchester branch and would highly recommend them.

reviews.title: Great Service Again
reviews.body: A long term customer who has recently arranged a new mortgage with LBS we received great advice from David Smith which was very much appreciated.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.body: From the initial "walk in", asking for information, making an appointment and the meeting with Andrew was five star.Leeds Building Society had just the right account for my Daughter and I

reviews.title: Went into branch in Southampton
reviews.body: Went into branch in Southampton, someone (Alison) saw me straight away and carried out request efficiently. Please keep your branches open. Thanks

reviews.title: I would like to thank the staff in the…
reviews.body: I would like to thank the staff in the Crossgates branch once again for going above and beyond today...Adel ...Chantel and Gordon...they are a credit to the bank...they are alway's helpful, professional and friendly...they all went out there way today to help me...I can not thank them enough...Chantel worked over her finishing time to follow up on a query that I had...

reviews.title: Excellent service by Ebony this morning.
reviews.body: Excellent service by Ebony this morning.

reviews.title: Jenny was a delight to speak to
reviews.body: Jenny was a delight to speak to, discussed and explained all options open to me with my accounts and helped me to carry out my wishes and is a credit to the company.

reviews.title: Leeds BS Norwich Branch
reviews.body: Visit today to Norwich open a savings account, spoke with Lynda. Very pleased with the high level of professionalism and diligence shown during our visit. Will certainly use Leeds BS Norwich branch for future investments based on our experience today

reviews.title: Sophie at LBS
reviews.body: Was dealt with by Sophie at the Barnsley branch and the young lady was very helpful with my financial requirements.

reviews.title: Excellent customer service
reviews.body: Customer service from Shevani was excellent.  I needed help setting up online account as I had thrown out piece of paper with my PW and User Name.  Shevani guided me what to do and, most importantly, stayed on call to ensure I could access my account.  Thanks for the great service Shevani.

reviews.title: Words of thanks
reviews.body: May I thank, Shivani, of the Leeds Building Society, for her time and  effort, in getting me, a novice in these matters, registered onto an online account. She took me through the procedure - which, because of my inexperience in these matters, took some time - with patience and good humour. She's a Star.Best RegardsMichael

reviews.title: Rosalyn Eldred …
reviews.body: I had the pleasure of going into your Barkingside Branch yesterday & it’s always a pleasure to see everyone.They are always so very helpful to me.I had to transfer money to my bank account Johnathan and Vanancy were dealing with it as I was making a car purchase and Vanancy said that if I pay a fee the money would be in my account within 2 hours.Johnathan took great care in making sure everything was correct because it was a lot of money.Johnathan,Vanancy,Sharon & Bash always friendly,polite & so very helpful & knowledgeable about your money.It’s a pleasure to go into your Barkingside Branch.

reviews.title: Customer service exceed expectations
reviews.body: Craig solved my problem very quickly and easily. His customer service skills exceeded my expectations along with his calm and respectful manner.

reviews.title: Had to call for information regarding… ISA Transfer
reviews.body: Had to call for information regarding transferring my ISA to a new ISA, as my current ISA matures next week.Got through to Bashir, who not only gave me the information I required, but also completed the full transaction into the new account, on my behalf. He was very polite, very friendly, and immensely professional.I was particularly impressed, as I only originally called for information, and was expecting to have to set up accounts and do any transfers myself… so the fact Bashir did it all for me, saved me all that bother. Hugely satisfied!!

reviews.title: Excellent service by Epsom Branch (Johnny)
reviews.body: I drove 1 hour each way to close my mum's Leeds BS account at the Epsom branch and I was glad that I did. Jonny was really helpful as we worked our way step by step through the paperwork. Furthermore the branch was short handed being manned by Johnny and Richard only.Keep up the good work!Graham

reviews.title: I’m trying to sort finances for my…
reviews.body: I’m trying to sort finances for my elderly mother and with incorrect passwords freezing us out of her online  account I telephoned for support. Shivani was incredibly patient, helpful and went way above and beyond to guide us through not only what was required now but future instructions to save us needing to call back. Incredibly impressed with her courteous manner

reviews.title: It was a real pleasure speaking to…
reviews.body: It was a real pleasure speaking to Craig this morning. He explained everything clearly to me. He answered all my numerous questions and I didn't feel rushed or pressurised. Thank you Craig.

reviews.title: Costa is showing care to customers and…
reviews.body: Costa is showing care to customers and he demonstrated an attitude of willing to help from the beginning of the conversation. Thanks a lot.

reviews.title: Such a lovely lady that rang me to…
reviews.body: Such a lovely lady that rang me to discuss my new mortgage deal,A real pleasure to talk with her and very understanding of any questions I asked her.

reviews.title: Thank you Rachel and Mia on the phone…
reviews.body: Thank you Rachel and Mia on the phone at customer services today. They both were very professional, and so helpful and pleasant.

reviews.title: Worst banking experience I've ever had
reviews.body: The worst website I have ever had the misfortune of using. Whenever I try to access their website, 99% of the time I get an error message, so I can't log into my account. I have tried using a private tab, I've tried clearing caches, literally nothing works. I don't know how they can be allowed to have a website that works so terribly when they're holding onto peoples money. I will be transferring mine and my boyfriend's cash isas to a different bank as soon as possible because, ironically, I'd quite like to actually be able to access my money. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Excellent customer service
reviews.body: When I rang with a problem logging in, the phone was answered promptly by Craig who was very patient and understanding even to the fact that he understood I had a hearing problem. Nothing was too much bother for him and he spent a good while explaining things and trying to solve my problem which we did in the end. Thank you Craig.

reviews.title: Great and quick customer support
reviews.body: Just had some great customer support from Rosie, who did a fantastic job at getting my password reset and access restored to my savings account within minutes. Made my day. Great work Rosie!

reviews.title: Renewing my ISA
reviews.body: The lady I spoke to guided me through renewing my ISA and was very helpful,

reviews.title: Simple quick process to set up an…
reviews.body: Simple quick process to set up an account.

reviews.title: First class service ,thank you !!
reviews.body: I left a message and they returned my call as promised Faye was polite and friendly and answered my queriesI went into the branch as suggested and Faye dealt with opening an account which I had requested .Faye was so professionally and treated me with respect and dignity .We have been customers for years .Her knowledge of Leeds products was first class .It’s so wonderful to able to go into my local branch and speak to someone in person ,long may it stay !!Thank you to Faye and all the team at Leeds Building Society in Acomb York .

reviews.title: The staff at the Cardiff branch are…
reviews.body: The staff at the Cardiff branch are very professional and clearly care about making the customer feel completely confident about the way they deal with a customer. Good communication and go that extra mile to support the customer.Ben and Paula are extremely helpful and always very friendly.

reviews.title: I had a lovely experience talking to…
reviews.body: I had a lovely experience talking to Mya who helped me so much when I was struggling online. She was very calm and helpful explaining processes and why things had to be asked. Thank you Mya.

reviews.title: Barnsley branch
reviews.body: Barnsley branchA special mention for Sarah. I cannot put into words how much of an asset Sarah is to the Barnsley Branch. Being a customer for a few years and having moved from other bank/building societies - LBS is one of the few where you can walk in and speak to an advisor without an appointment or being asked to go online. Sarah is very informative and very knowledgable regarding all the products I enquired about - including ISAS, Bonds and variety of savings options. I never feel rushed, she reassures that you understand fully what product you are taking before asking you to sign.I 100% recommend Barnsley branch for their fabulous customer service and great products.

reviews.title: Derby branch: Michaela is fantastic
reviews.body: We visited the Derby branch on St. James’s Street and spoke to Michaela. What a pleasurable experience we had. My father passed away a couple of weeks ago and we (me and Mum) wanted to close his account and open a new ISA in my Mum’s name. Michaela was exceedingly patient, describing the procedure of reporting a bereavement and opening another account, in meticulous detail. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Excellent Service from Amy
reviews.body: Title: Excellent service from Amy at Leeds Building SocietyI recently spoke with Amy at Leeds Building Society and she was fantastic from start to finish. She was really friendly, very supportive, and remained completely professional throughout our conversation.Amy took the time to listen, explained everything clearly, and made what could have been a stressful process feel much easier. It’s rare to get this level of care and attention, and I really appreciated it.Thank you, Amy, for your help and support!

reviews.title: Hull Branch
reviews.body: I was in the Hull branch on Friday 21st November, Denise was very professional and helpful setting me up as the Power of Attorney for my sister who has an account with the Society. I was prepared to make an appointment, but she was able to fit me in there and then.

reviews.title: The knowledge and patience of Jeanette…
reviews.body: The knowledge and patience of Jeanette during the call was first class. I would highly recommend.

reviews.title: Have just visited my local branch of…
reviews.body: Have just visited my local branch of the Leeds Building Society in Banbury.I felt i had to say that Claire the Manager & her Staff always go the Extra Mile when it comes to customer service.well done to you all.

reviews.title: Provided lovely service and told me…
reviews.body: Provided lovely service and told me everything I needed to know

reviews.title: Representative was very assured…
reviews.body: Representative was very assured throughout and took me through a rather tedious process as quickly as possible

reviews.title: Ghazal, what a star!
reviews.body: Had a great service/help when I went to the branch in Holborn, London. I went there because I wanted to open an online account but didn’t know how. Ghazal seems knowledgeable and happy to help me register on line when I became “stuck” with some of the security check questions. Left the branch feeling happy, because I managed to complete what I set out to do today.

reviews.title: Arham at the Moortown branch in Leeds…
reviews.body: Arham at the Moortown branch in Leeds was really helpful to both my wife and myself today.He patiently answered all our questions efficiently and in an easy to understand fashion.

reviews.title: Proactively Helpful
reviews.body: I have been very impressed with Leeds lately. Their savings interest rates are highly competitive. Last month they proactively contacted me to let me know they had a new ISA with a better rate which I could switch my existing account to. When I submitted my request to do that, I got a message apologizing that they were busy and it may take a few days before they processed my request, but don't worry, the new interest rate would be backdated accordingly. In fact, when the transaction went through, I found they had backdated the higher rate to the date they originally emailed me, before I'd even applied for a transfer. It's little things like this that make you feel looked after as a customer.

reviews.title: Opened a new account online
reviews.body: Opened a new account online. First account with the LBSoc.Everything and everyone involved (thanks Arianna in Harrogate) has been first class.I especially liked the fact that when I had a query and needed to speak to someone I was able to actually phone my local branch and speak virtually instantly to an actual person - no endless irritating automated call centre nonsense.There are plenty of other things to recommend this building society as well, including an automated messaging service to both email and phone to confirm deposits sent from my bank, Santander (who I’d also recommend.)

reviews.title: Agent exceptionally patient and kind .
reviews.body: Reply from Leeds Building Society

reviews.title: John Atkinson has been excellent in…
reviews.body: John Atkinson has been excellent in walking me through and arranging the transfer of equity on my property. 👍🏻

reviews.title: Solihull branch of Leeds building society
reviews.body: Went into leeds building society very impressed with the service and help provided by Ibrahim who dealt with us. Would highly recommend the leeds.Thank you ibrahim.

reviews.title: Great staff in the call centres
reviews.body: Great staff in the call centres, Bashir from Barkingside was really helpful, as was a colleague when I called yesterday

reviews.title: Ethan opened a new account for us in a…
reviews.body: Ethan opened a new account for us in a friendly and professional manner. Excellent service no messing about.Full marks Ethan

reviews.title: Leeds Windfall!
reviews.body: I had cause to complain recently because I thought Leeds had made a mistake. Ellice (specialist customer representative) contacted me one day after making my complaint, which is blisteringly fast. Turns out the mistake was by another organisation, but in the course of investigating the complaint Ellice discovered a dormant account of mine that had a forgotten £1,700 in there. To go from complaining to found money was such a surprise, and a lovely end to the day.Everyone I spoke to at Leeds was amazing though. They all have a really nice manner and I really appreciate how they always ask if you have any accommodation needs before proceeding with the call.

reviews.title: Thank you Rachel .                                                                           We are extremely grateful to Rachel…
reviews.body: We are so grateful to Rachel Henderson for her help with renewing our buy to let mortgage.Rachel communicates well, she answered all our questions clearly and explained anything we were unsure of.She is extremely professional, understanding and very patient.Many thanks, Cheryl & Richard Henley

reviews.title: Appointment with Tracey in m/c branch
reviews.body: Appointment with Tracey in m/c branch, she helped me to get better rates on a 1yr double access saver from a five access saver also reinvested in a ISA.for another 12 months, very good serviceThank you

reviews.title: Problems accessing accounts
reviews.body: For some reason I had 2 profiles on the system which was causing a logging in with old passwords etc. However Shavani was very helpful and resolved the issue for me although I had to ring in twice, she stayed on the phone with me until the problem was dealt with.

reviews.title: Excellent service once again
reviews.body: Excellent service from Samantha at the Horsforth branch yesterday morning when I opened a cash ISA.Everything was explained very clearly and I was most impressed.This extremely high level of service is offered by all the staff we’ve had dealings with over the years.Top marks to you all!!

reviews.title: Shavira was very helpful
reviews.body: Reply from Leeds Building Society

reviews.title: John Atkinson has been excellent…
reviews.body: John Atkinson has been excellent walking me through and arranging the transfer of equity on my property 👍🏻

reviews.title: Deborah Williams Mortgage consultant…
reviews.body: Deborah Williams Mortgage consultant was brilliant and supportive in every step. Thanks a lot!!

reviews.title: Kieran was so efficient
reviews.body: Kieran was so efficient, knowledgeable and friendly. Very impressed with all the service we received. We look forward to a long relationship with Leeds.

reviews.title: Another great service from LBS.
reviews.body: Another great service from LBS.I dealt with Mark who was very knowledgable when it came to mortgage advice and support as we progressed through the application and is very amenable to continue discussions should I require any further support as we progress through the application.

reviews.title: Spoke to a lovely lady today to sort…
reviews.body: Spoke to a lovely lady today to sort out my mortgage as it came to the end of it's deal ....Debbie Williams you are an absolute credit to Leeds Building Society thank you so much .

reviews.title: My wife and myself went into Leeds    …
reviews.body: My wife and myself went into Leeds Building Societyto tell them we had just got our paperwork for our Lasting Powers  of Attorney.  We spoke to Denise and she ask us if we had time to do  it today. We completed the paperwork  in no time.  Great service , it is nice to have such a pleasant experience. This was in the Hull branch.

reviews.title: Sheffield, Pinstone Street Branch
reviews.body: Knowledgeable and proficient staff - Opening a new account & updating passbook for a closed account managed in an informative and friendly manner, including timely advice re protecting oneself against fraud.

reviews.title: North Eastern friendliness
reviews.body: Dealing with Kerrie from start to finish, was an absolute pleasure. Speaking to a real human being, who understood my requirements, along with a friendly chat in the midst of it all. True North Eastern friendliness at its best

reviews.title: Superb customer experience
reviews.body: I encountered problems completing an ISA transfer thank goodness Lindsay  answered my call. She was superb and took customer care to another level. She was instrumental in solving the problems and kept me fully informed all during the transaction process. Thank you so much Lindsay really appreciate your time and help.

reviews.title: Excellent Service.
reviews.body: As always at Leeds Building Society had great service on our last  visit to discuss our ISA’s. Friendly knowledgeable and efficiently given to my wife and I. All our queries answered and we were very satisfied. A big thanks and well done to Arianna at the Harrogate branch. 👍

reviews.title: Excellent service at Epsom branch
reviews.body: Rachana at the Epsom branch was excellent.  She clearly explained everything to my elderly father and slowly & carefully took him through each step of opening an account.  She was efficient & polite.

reviews.title: Leeds Building Society are helpful
reviews.body: We were amazed at how easy & professional phone calls were with Daniel Johnstone. He provided us with clear information when asking about a new fixed rate on our mortgage. Nothing was forced on us, we made the choices that suited us.Thank you Dan for your help 😀

reviews.title: Excellent customer care changing our…
reviews.body: Excellent customer care changing our mortgage due to unforeseen personal issues David was brilliant couldn’t do enough to help and support us 5 star service a big thank you

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.body: Craig was very helpful and knowledgeable.

reviews.title: Customer Service "owns" issues to resolution
reviews.body: I had a problem with my online account access.  Costa took ownership of tracking through to resolution.  It took a few days but all the way through I was kept informed of what was happening, and Costa spent a long time on the phone with me setting up new log-in details and checking the solution worked.  This is so refreshing compared to other finance providers.

reviews.title: Hopeless website and no app
reviews.body: The website doesn’t work when you need it to, and they don’t have an app either. Hopeless.

reviews.title: Instant Acces Saver Acc
reviews.body: Opened my Instant Access saver account with LBS and was impressed with the knowledgeable and friendly but very professional advice given by Sarah (Sale branch) It’s a good rate and the account is very flexible would definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.body: Praful of London,  Holborn,  was incredibly helpful and made the transition very easy and clear.

reviews.title: Face to face meeting…
reviews.body: It was great to sort out my finance face to face rather than doing it online or by telephone as a number of banks/building societies do not do it this way anymore.  Lady was very helpful sorting it for me.

reviews.title: Mortgage Customer service is great
reviews.body: I’ve just made a change to my mortgage, Rachel Henderson was extremely helpful and efficient and everything was done in a call. I would highly recommend both her and Leeds.

reviews.title: Miss Scot was very good  she explained…
reviews.body: Miss Scot was very good  she explained everything very well. She understood my needs. I like to stay with Leeds if they can give a competitive rate
